creator: freebsd@bitter-almonds.com
text:
*ugh* Sorry for the noise, but need to mention that I did not notice lack of line break(s) between the long git command line & the commit string of "53da54b936" in output; "git-log" command should have been ...

git log --show-linear-break --abbrev=10 \
  --pretty=format:'%C(auto,yellow)%h%Creset%C(auto,reverse)%C(auto,green)% D%Creset%ncommit: %C(auto,magenta)%cd%Creset %cn %cE%nauthor: %C(auto,green)%ad%Creset %an %aE%n%n%B' \
  --patch --branches main -S 1400080
